title: Find Kth Bit in Nth Binary String
hints: Observe the recursive structure: Sn is composed of S(n-1), a middle '1', and a transformed S(n-1).
Determine if k falls in the first half, middle, or second half of Sn to decide which part to recurse into.
If k is in the second half, map it to the corresponding index in S(n-1) and flip the resulting bit.
